understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by navigating a grid and matching goal cells. Each goal cell requires the player's carried piece to simultaneously match a specific shape, color, and rotation. To match, the player must first step on modifier tiles to adjust these attributes, then step onto the goal cell. Managing stamina is essential: moves consume stamina, and losing all stamina costs a life; running out of lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls a piece with three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Movement is in four directions (north, south, east, west). Moving to an adjacent empty square costs 1 stamina. Trying to move into a wall leaves the position unchanged and does not consume stamina. Stamina reaching zero results in losing a life. Modifier tiles change the piece's attributes: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color, and rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate and are completed only when the player steps on them with the exact required shape, color, and rotation. Completing all goal cells in a level advances to the next level; completing all levels wins the game.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by navigating a grid and matching goal cells. Each goal cell requires the player's carried piece to simultaneously match a specific shape, color, and rotation. To match, the player must first step on modifier tiles to adjust these attributes, then step onto the goal cell. Managing stamina is essential: moves consume stamina, and losing all stamina costs a life; running out of lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player controls a piece with three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Movement is in four directions (north, south, east, west). Moving to an adjacent empty square costs 1 stamina. Trying to move into a wall leaves the position unchanged and does not consume stamina. Stamina reaching zero results in losing a life. Modifier tiles change the piece's attributes: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color, and rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate and are completed only when the player steps on them with the exact required shape, color, and rotation. Completing all goal cells in a level advances to the next level; completing all levels wins the game.
